title: Shopify Product Description Packs for E-Commerce
description: 30 prompts for e-commerce store owners to write SEO-optimized, benefit-focused product descriptions that convert browsers into buyers.
gumroad_description:
Your product descriptions are costing you sales — and you probably already know it.

Who this is for

  • Shopify store owners writing descriptions themselves and staring at a blank page
  • Freelancers and VA's managing product copy for multiple e-commerce clients
  • Brand owners who know their product but struggle to make it sound irresistible in writing

What's inside

  • 30 plug-and-play prompts engineered to produce benefit-led, SEO-friendly copy — not filler text
  • Markdown and JSON formats so you can drop them directly into your workflow or automation stack
  • Prompts tested across ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini — no prompt-tweaking required
  • Structured specifically for Shopify product pages: titles, bullets, and full descriptions covered

Stop rewriting the same bad description four times. These prompts do the heavy lifting so you can ship faster and sell more.

Download and use it today.

Discover more tools like this at mini-on-ai.com.
